topic: F-TP5-b PASS — weave_compose() end-to-end MVP composition, P=10 bundles × N=50 trials per bundle = 500 trial rows + 1 aggregate, 6/6 deterministic criteria
verdict_detail: _python_bridge/module/weave_composition.py (813 LOC, Python stdlib only) implements write-side composition pipeline: 12-strand built-in catalogue (FASTA-style {id, sequence, length, conf_state_tau6 0..3 placeholder}), greedy inverse-search over σ(6)=12 raw-strategy pool exponents 1..12, Landauer floor gate (heat_budget_kT=1e6 default), Π^p_2 verifier stub (pairwise sequence-overlap < threshold). BLOSUM62 inlined as constant table. New --compose mode coexists with existing --cage-assembly, --bayesian-audit, --all modes.

implementation_notes.catalogue_built_in: 12 strands {id, sequence, length, conf_state_tau6 (0..3 categorical placeholder)} — self-contained MVP, no external FASTA dependency
implementation_notes.greedy_compose: per trial: pick random subset (size from σ(6)=12 raw-strategy pool exponents 1..12); score = energy_proxy − landauer_kT_floor + nyquist_compat_penalty; BLOSUM62 inlined ~24 constant lines for energy_proxy
implementation_notes.landauer_gate: landauer_floor_check(bundle, T_kelvin=310, heat_budget_kT=1e6) — threshold per parent §10 F-CL2-a 10^6 orders claim
implementation_notes.pi_p2_verifier_stub: pairwise sequence-overlap < threshold (MVP-grade; full Π^p_2 NP solver explicitly out of scope per parent §9 R-list)

raw_91_c3_disclose: Greedy heuristic acceptable per .roadmap.weave C0a + parent body §6 L9 / parent §3 W7 ('greedy heuristic acceptable for MVP'). Full Π^p_2 NP solver out of scope per parent §9 R-list.
Π^p_2 verifier is MVP-grade STUB (pairwise sequence-overlap, not ∀-off-target ∃-refold-avoidance NP solver).
Landauer gate threshold heat_budget_kT=1e6 is literal interpretation of parent §10 F-CL2-a 10^6 orders claim — flagged for user confirmation in plan, default applied.
Off-target ban list = empty default (acceptable for MVP).
AF-3 differentiation case (P0-5 / F-MVP-3) NOT in this kick — out of scope for C0b per cross-cutting decision (deferred to C0c or later).
Strand semantics: FASTA seq + τ(6)=4 conformer-state as categorical 0..3 placeholder — definitive answer pending domain expert input.
(R2) preserved: cage_assembly_simulation.py and polyhedral_cage_bayesian_audit.py untouched — read-only audit/assembly path remains the cycle-22 RESOLVED reference.

raw_71_falsifiers.condition: weave_compose registry rows ≠ P×N+1 within 30d (regression on PASS criterion 6)
landauer_floor_check default heat_budget_kT (1e6) revised without §10 F-CL2-a citation update
Π^p_2 verifier upgraded from stub to true NP-solver path within 180d (closes MVP-stub gap; if not, ratchet down to C0c claim)
